summary: bug(settings): Make sure that PostVerify/SetPassword is aligned with Signup/Setpassword
description:
Because:
- We want users to have a consistent experience when 'setting' paswords

This Commit:
- Ensures the legal links are correct when going through a VPN flow.
- Ensures the cms info is infact rendered properly
- Adds CMS: prefix to mocks to disambiguate cms content from default content
- Fixes the position of the displayed email to come after the cms description.
